title: tokens-bruecke CLI configuration
description: Configuration file for the tokens-bruecke CLI (passed via --config). All properties are optional; defaults are applied for missing keys. Explicit CLI flags override values from this file.

includedStyles.description: Which Figma styles to include in the export, and the token group name for each.

includeScopes.description: Include Figma variable scopes in token $extensions metadata.

useDTCG.description: Use DTCG format keys ($value, $type, $description). Set to false for legacy keys without the $ prefix.

useDTCGKeys.description: DEPRECATED alias for useDTCG. Use useDTCG instead.

includeValueStringKeyToAlias.description: Add a valueString key with the resolved value next to alias tokens.

colorMode.description: Output format for color token values.

storeStyleInCollection.description: Name of the variable collection to nest exported styles under, or "none" to keep styles as top-level groups.

includeFigmaMetaData.description: Include Figma-specific metadata (variable ids, collection ids) in $extensions["tokens-bruecke-meta"].

usePercentageOpacity.description: Express opacity values as percentages instead of 0-1 numbers.

splitByCollection.description: Write each collection as a separate {Collection}.tokens.json file in the output directory. Overridden by the --split-by-collection CLI flag.

splitByMode.description: Write each mode as a separate {Collection}/{Mode}.tokens.json file. Overridden by the --split-by-mode CLI flag.

omitCollectionNames.description: Omit collection names as top-level groups; merge all tokens into a single namespace. Overridden by the --omit-collection-names CLI flag.

isIncluded.description: Whether to include this style type in the export.

customName.description: Token group name used for this style type in the output.
